checklist.description: Need an externally validated business target (e.g. official university risk flag, counselor assessment) that is not derived from the same behavioral dataset
Temporal generalization AUC should remain >= 0.8 on held-out time periods
Life risk scores should correlate meaningfully with study domain risk indicators for same students
Model should be tested on a future cohort not used in any label construction or feature engineering

conclusion: life domain is mature for harness integration as a predictive proxy model, but remains not_releaseable_for_prod until external truth validation is available.
